title: Revolut acquires full UK banking license after years-long wait
summary_full: The UK-based startup hit a valuation of $75 billion in 2025 and is one of Europe's most valuable private tech companies.
summary_public: The UK-based startup hit a valuation of $75 billion in 2025 and is one of Europe's most valuable private tech companies.
